headline: Assessing Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Valuation After A Sharp Pullback In Recent Trading
summary: Why Super Micro Computer is on investors’ radar today Super Micro Computer (SMCI) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock about 30% lower over the past month and roughly 48% lower over the past year, sharpening questions around its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Super Micro Computer. headline: Mirantis Announces Support for NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, Building on Open Source to Deliver AI Infrastructure
summary: AMSTERDAM, March 24, 2026--KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026--Mirantis, delivering Kubernetes-native infrastructure for AI, today announced support for the NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, an open-source technology to build next-generation AI cloud platforms, plus progress with an ecosystem of partners delivering an open, composable infrastructure platform based on k0rdent — purpose-built to support AI workloads.

content.title: Mirantis Announces Support for NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, Building on Open Source to Deliver AI Infrastructure
content.summary: AMSTERDAM, March 24, 2026--KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026--Mirantis, delivering Kubernetes-native infrastructure for AI, today announced support for the NVIDIA NCX Infra Controller, an open-source technology to build next-generation AI cloud platforms, plus progress with an ecosystem of partners delivering an open, composable infrastructure platform based on k0rdent — purpose-built to support AI workloads.
